title: S-BENZYL THIURONIUM DERIVATIVES OF OXYMETHYLENE KETONES
author: M. D. RATNAKAR
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: S -Benzyl thiuronium chloride reacts in aqueous alcoholic solution with oxymethylene ketones to form well defined crystalline derivatives. In some cases the sodium compounds of the oxymethylene ketones, formed in their  preparation, directly react with the reagent whereas in others the ketones must first be exactly neutralised with caustic soda or caustic potash and then made to react with the reagent.
steps_raw: S -Benzyl thiuronium chloride reacts in aqueous alcoholic solution with oxymethylene ketones to form well defined crystalline derivatives. In some cases the sodium compounds of the oxymethylene ketones, formed in their  preparation, directly react with the reagent whereas in others the ketones must first be exactly neutralised with caustic soda or caustic potash and then made to react with the reagent.
